title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF CEBU

chunks.text:
H. No. 3907 / 56 OG No. 46, 7024 (November 14, 1960)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2672, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF CEBU

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The last sentence of Section thirty-two of Commonwealth Act Numbered Fifty-eight, otherwise known as the Charter of the City of Cebu, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"The chief of police shall receive a salary of seven thousand two hundred pesos

per annum

."

SEC. 2. Section thirty-three of the same Act, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 33.

Assistant chief of police: Commissioned officers.

âThere shall be an assistant chief of police whose duties shall be to act as chief of police in the absence or inability to act of the chief of police, and under the direction of such chief to look after the discipline of the police force and to perform such other duties as may be imposed upon him by the chief or prescribed by law or ordinance. He shall receive a salary of six thousand pesos

per annum

.

"Commissioned officers under the police force shall receive salaries as follows: for major, four thousand eight hundred pesos

per annum

; for captain, four thousand two hundred pesos

per annum

; for first lieutenant, three thousand six hundred pesos

per annum

; and for second lieutenant, three thousand pesos

per annum

."

SEC. 3. The last sentence of Section thirty-four of the same Act, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"He shall receive a salary of five thousand four hundred Pesos

per annum

."

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
